top_signals.title: Judge rules insurers do not need to pay out over Nord Stream pipeline blasts
top_signals.summary: Lloyd’s of London and others spared potential €580mn payout as court finds ‘war exclusion’ applies for Russia’s busted pipes
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nvidia Server Delay Report Sends Asian Tech Stocks Sliding
top_signals.summary: Asian technology stocks slumped after a report that Nvidia Corp.’s next-generation AI server rack system has been delayed by more than a year due to manufacturing difficulties.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Belgium Fumes After FIFA Clears Balogun Following Trump Call
top_signals.summary: FIFA's decision to overturn US striker Folarin Balogun's World Cup suspension — after an intervention from Donald Trump — has caused fury in Belgium. Max Ramsay explains why the reversal is overshadowing their crucial match against Team USA. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Welltower Seeks at Least $492 Million From Canada Bond Sale
top_signals.summary: Welltower Inc. is looking to raise at least C$700 million ($492 million) in a two-part bond deal, the latest US firm to tap investors north of the border.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Private Equity's Next Sports Play
top_signals.summary: Wall Street is making a bigger bet on sports. William Blair's acquisition of Inner Circle Sports underscores why investors see enormous opportunity in pro teams, women's sports and college athletics. Inner Circle Sports Founder Rob Tillis and William Blair's Global Head of Investment Banking Matt Zimmer join Open Interest to explain what's driving soaring franchise values and why they believe the industry's biggest growth is still ahead. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Summer Box Office Builds Momentum
top_signals.summary: The summer box office is heating up, and more momentum could be on the way. Daniel Loria, Senior Vice President at The Boxoffice Company, says two major July releases -- Universal's The Odyssey and Sony's Spider-Man: Brand New Day -- could keep audiences coming to theaters. He joined Bloomberg TV with his outlook. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Hamas says it will dissolve Gaza civilian governing arm
top_signals.summary: Announcement sparks scepticism that group will relinquish power after it makes no mention of giving up weapons

top_signals.title: AVAX One launches CEO search after leader of its Avalanche treasury pivot steps down
top_signals.summary: SkyBridge founder Anthony Scaramucci backed AVAX One's $550 million Avalanche treasury strategy announced last year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
